failedAssertions.reason: Contract requires zero JavaScript console errors. Observed one error-level console entry on load. This appears tied to an external stylesheet URL (Typekit placeholder) rather than an uncaught page JS runtime exception, but it is still an error-level console message during landing-page load.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for browser and repo-cli isolation boundaries.
Documented current-run concurrency adjustment to max 3 validators based on observed machine load.
